chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-1861 of 2017 --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- For hearing of main case. 03.03.2025 Mr.Salahuddin Khan Gandapur, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr.Sandeep Malani, A.A.G. Mr.Abdul Samad, Advocate for NADRA. The petitioner claims to have been aggrieved by non-issuance of P.R.C. / Domicile Certificate, hence this petition. Upon inquiry no application in such regard to the competent authority could be demonstrated and the petitioner remains at liberty to move application before the appropriate forum for redressal of is grievance. No case for direct recourse in writ jurisdiction is made out, hence, this petition is dismissed. Judge Judge nasir
